definitions: To cause or allow (liquid) to flow over the edge of its container, especially unintentionally.
To flow over the edge of a container.
To reveal (a secret or information), especially unintentionally or carelessly.
To fall or cause to fall from a container or place.
examples: Be careful not to spill the coffee.
The milk spilled all over the floor.
He spilled the beans about the surprise party.
Many lives were spilled in the battle.
The contents of the bag spilled out.
